Script.name: RWDA Loader
Script.script:
function rwda_bootstrap_loader() local function log(msg) if type(echo) == "function" then echo("[RWDA Loader] " .. msg .. "\n") end end
local function fileExists(path) if type(path) ~= "string" or path == "" then return false end local f = io.open(path, "r") if f then f:close(); return true end return false end
local candidates = { [[C:\Users\jness\Documents\Project Silverfury\ProjectSilverfury\rwda\init.lua]], getMudletHomeDir() .. [[\rwda\init.lua]], getMudletHomeDir() .. [[/rwda/init.lua]], }
local initPath = nil for _, path in ipairs(candidates) do if fileExists(path) then initPath = path break end end
if not initPath and type(invokeFileDialog) == "function" then local chosen = invokeFileDialog(false, "Select RWDA init.lua") if chosen and chosen ~= "" and fileExists(chosen) then initPath = chosen end end
if not initPath then log("Could not locate rwda/init.lua. Update the loader path in script 'RWDA Loader'.") return end
local ok, err = pcall(dofile, initPath) if not ok then log("Load failed: " .. tostring(err)) return end
if rwda and rwda.bootstrap and not rwda._bootstrapped then local base = initPath:match("^(.*)[/\\][^/\\]+$") local bOk, bErr = pcall(rwda.bootstrap, { load_files = true, base_path = base }) if not bOk then log("Bootstrap failed: " .. tostring(bErr)) return end end
log("Loaded from " .. initPath) end
rwda_bootstrap_loader()
